name: Personio
description: Monitor Personio employee records and status for HR compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Personio
2. Go to Settings > Integrations > API Credentials
3. Generate new API credentials (or use existing ones)
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Enter them below

Note: The API credentials need read access to employees.

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Personio Settings > API Access > API Credentials

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Personio Settings > API Access > API Credentials

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Personio employees and verifies only active employees have access

checks.name: Employee Verification
checks.description: Verifies all Personio employees have work email addresses on file
